tables.name: comments
tables.rowTs: { authorId: string; body: string; createdAt: number; id: string; postId: string }

tables.name: posts
tables.rowTs: { authorId: string; body: string; coverImage?: { path: string; url: string; mime: string; size: number } | null; createdAt: number; excerpt?: string; id: string; published: boolean; publishedAt: number; slug: string; title: string }

fields.tsType: { path: string; url: string; mime: string; size: number } | null

tables.name: users
tables.rowTs: { email: string; id: string; name: string; password: string; roles?: (string)[] }

views.name: get_comments
views.outputTs: ({ authorName: string; comment: { authorId: string; body: string; createdAt: number; id: string; postId: string } })[]

views.name: get_post
views.outputTs: { authorName: string; post: { authorId: string; body: string; coverImage?: { path: string; url: string; mime: string; size: number } | null; createdAt: number; excerpt?: string; id: string; published: boolean; publishedAt: number; slug: string; title: string } } | null

views.name: list_posts
views.outputTs: ({ authorName: string; post: { authorId: string; body: string; coverImage?: { path: string; url: string; mime: string; size: number } | null; createdAt: number; excerpt?: string; id: string; published: boolean; publishedAt: number; slug: string; title: string } })[]

reducers.name: create_post
reducers.inputTs: { body: string; coverImage: string; excerpt: string; slug: string; title: string }
reducers.outputTs: { authorId: string; body: string; coverImage?: { path: string; url: string; mime: string; size: number } | null; createdAt: number; excerpt?: string; id: string; published: boolean; publishedAt: number; slug: string; title: string }
